title: Upload subitems to muliple items at one time
excerpt: This feature would be highly valuable for organizing our work with school districts and schools, entities that are already nested in structure. Because there are over a 1000 schools we work with at hundreds of districts …

posts.author: karenyw (certsuser)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be highly valuable for organizing our work with school districts and schools, entities that are already nested in structure. Because there are over a 1000 schools we work with at hundreds of districts uploading 1 by 1 is not time efficient.

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @karenyw

Hope you are well!

With the Subitem Automations app, there are several different ways in which you can copy multiple subitems to multiple parent items simultaneously!

Here’s one of the automations that you can use →

image2324×704 32.4 KB

Also, I’m assuming you’re working on multiple boards. Keeping all the data synced between all those boards is not an easy task, but we’ve created an easy solution for it! Try the Connected Boards Automations app!

FREE plan is available on all our apps!

We have more automation recipes for advanced use cases as well! I’d love to discuss the use case further so I can help you find the perfect solution you’re looking for. Feel free to contact us anytime!
